title: LX-1 laser-flechette mine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''LX-1 laser-flechette mine''' was an explosive made by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]] Upon activation, it would release a hail of laser bolt [[Flechette/Legends|flechettes]].

The weapons were used by the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] munitions specialist [[Rach'talik]] to kill his employer, the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Shala]].

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
